creator: tembun@bk.ru
text:
Yesterday I compiled gource-0.55 against boost-libs-1.85 and it did build successfully.  I run it on FreeBSD source code repository (~300,000 commits) as a stress-test and it works fine: no crashes, no errors I see in the stderr.  So, I guess, it can be updated now.  I can submit a patch.

Artem.
